nasb.text: They brought up the ark and the tent of meeting and all the holy utensils which were in the tent; the Levitical priests brought them up.

esv.text: And they brought up the ark, the tent of meeting, and all the holy vessels that were in the tent; the Levitical priests brought them up.

cnv.text: 他們把約櫃、會幕和會幕裡的一切神聖器皿都抬上來；是祭司和利未人把它們抬上來的。

ccb.text: 祭司和利未人将约柜、会幕和会幕里的一切圣器运上来。
